pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-validation dependency to provide Jakarta validation support.
Remove explicit version from mssql-jdbc dependency to let Spring Boot BOM manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: The specific version 10.2.0.jre11 is tied to Java 11 and may be incompatible or unnecessary with the managed version in Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit junit dependency as it is now managed by Spring Boot 3.x (which uses JUnit 5).
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x manages JUnit 5 dependencies; explicit JUnit 4 dependency is redundant and potentially conflicting.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.validation-api dependency to ensure Jakarta validation annotations are available.
Update maven-surefire-plugin version and remove explicit JUnit 47 provider dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses JUnit 5; the surefire-junit47 provider is obsolete and incompatible with the new test framework.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from versions-maven-plugin to let it be managed or use default.

src/main/java/com/ozgen/telegrambinanceb.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with the new List.getFirst() method introduced in Java 21.
